description: Whether the provider offers an in-IDE MCP server discovery and installation experience.

amp.mechanism: Amp does not have an in-IDE MCP marketplace

claude-code.mechanism: Claude Code does not have an in-IDE MCP marketplace for discovery and installation

cline.mechanism: mcp_marketplace: Cline has an in-IDE MCP server discovery and installation experience

codex.mechanism: Codex does not have an in-IDE MCP marketplace

copilot-cli.mechanism: Copilot CLI does not have an in-IDE MCP marketplace

gemini-cli.mechanism: Gemini CLI does not have an in-IDE MCP marketplace

kiro.mechanism: Kiro does not have an in-IDE MCP marketplace

windsurf.mechanism: mcp_marketplace: Windsurf has an in-IDE MCP server discovery and one-click installation experience
